goal: Allow fixture agent-attempt evals to opt into a built-in DeepSeek-native yoyo command template instead of requiring every caller to provide a custom agent command.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures attempt --suite local-smoke --task fixture-agent-attempt-eval --worktree /tmp/yyds-fixture-default-agent --default-agent --dry-run
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Fixture agent-attempt evals can execute a caller-provided command, but there is no reproducible built-in DeepSeek-native harness command path for opt-in source patch generation attempts.
